# How to Build an Effective Winback Campaign - Iterable

## How to Build an Effective Winback Campaign

It happens to the best of us… sometimes customers just stop paying attention. Are they distracted? Just not that into you? What’s a marketer to do when a customer appears to call it quits?

While breakup songs may work for angsty teens, marketers have their own way to get customers back — the winback campaign.

**  
In our latest ebook, you’ll learn:**

*   Practical tips for how to identify the tell tale signs of customer churn
*   Which types of customers are more likely to re-engage and why they’re important
*   Ways to craft your own winback campaign through real-life examples and fresh inspiration
